meaning: n.<口>(英国苏格兰北部的)尼斯湖水怪
examples: How did Nessie get into Loch Nessie?
Nessie is usually categorized as a type of lake monster.
Most scientists agree that Nessie is neither a whale nor a shark.
Nessie was the only one that no prior permission had to be sought for.
"If I do meet Nessie, I'm not sure who will be more scared, the monster or myself, " he revealed.
